headline: Smurfit Westrock named Ryder Cup worldwide partner through 2031
summary: Under this arrangement, Smurfit Westrock will provide packaging solutions for the 2027, 2029, and 2031 tournaments.

raw.headline: Smurfit Westrock named Ryder Cup worldwide partner through 2031
raw.summary: Under this arrangement, Smurfit Westrock will provide packaging solutions for the 2027, 2029, and 2031 tournaments.
